title: lygodium salicifolium
intro: Lygodium salicifolium, also known as the willow fern or corkscrew fern, is a type of flowering fern native to Australia. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Lygodium salicifolium include its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Lygodium salicifolium can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
